public_boundary: Can support bounded descriptive concentration comparison, but not investment, policy, geopolitical, bottleneck, vulnerability, disruption, or complete risk-model claims.
current_decision: Retain as V2.4 base table; interpret through V2.10 traceability classes.
next_action: Use V2.10 before strengthening any mineral-specific claim.

public_boundary: Does not add external values and does not authorize stronger public claims.
current_decision: Use as source-enrichment backlog and priority map.
next_action: Natural graphite remains the next best enrichment target if continuing analysis.

public_boundary: Allows lithium to be described as source-traceable for the existing 2024 processing/refining top-three value; still not a risk, investment, policy, or geopolitical claim.
current_decision: Lithium traceability repair is complete for the existing V2.4 processing/refining value.
next_action: No immediate lithium traceability repair needed.

public_boundary: Allows manganese as a downstream battery-material proxy with explicit product-definition and denominator limitation; not a fully validated general processing/refining metric.
current_decision: Manganese remains useful but must stay proxy-limited.
next_action: Search denominator-aligned manganese evidence only if stronger manganese treatment is needed.

public_boundary: Confirms not all minerals have equivalent source strength and blocks generalized risk or vulnerability framing.
current_decision: Use as the primary internal guide before any public-facing downstream-concentration claim is strengthened.
next_action: Natural graphite product-definition traceability is the next best source-enrichment target.

public_boundary: Natural graphite can remain in V2.4 as a public-snapshot comparison with caveats, but should not be strengthened until product-definition traceability is added.
current_decision: Highest-value next enrichment target after lithium and manganese.
next_action: Create a Natural Graphite Product-Definition Traceability Register if continuing source enrichment.

public_boundary: Cobalt and nickel have small observed V2.4 gaps, so no stronger claim should be made without tighter source precision and denominator clarity.
current_decision: Lower priority than natural graphite unless the project needs small-gap precision.
next_action: Defer unless small-gap interpretation becomes important.
